---
title: "Overview"
lang: en
---

<!-- What we do and the big picture (OS-independent). -->

## What is this?

TODO: One-paragraph summary of what the participant will accomplish
(experience MADOCA-PPP convergence via mrtklib-docker-ui).

## The big picture

TODO: Diagram of the flow — receiver (mosaic-G5) → USB → container → UI.

{{< include ../_includes/receiver-note.qmd >}}

## Where to go next

- Concepts → [Concepts](10-concepts.qmd)
- Just run it → [Install](20-install.qmd), then your OS's Run chapter.
